devdoc.details: Core AI Data Marketplace contract deployed on Monad.      Enables privacy-preserving AI dataset transactions with:      - IPFS-based encrypted storage (CID on-chain only)      - MON token payments      - 2% platform fee, 98% to providers      - On-chain training session proofs      - Access control via AccessManager      - Royalty distribution via RoyaltyManager

EnforcedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is paused.

ExpectedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is not paused.

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

Paused(address).details: Emitted when the pause is triggered by `account`.

Unpaused(address).details: Emitted when the pause is lifted by `account`.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

params.datasetId: ID of the dataset to purchase

params.modelHash: Keccak256 hash of the trained model

params.category: Dataset category (CV, NLP, Audio, Tabular, Multimodal, etc.)
params.encryptedKeyHash: Hash of the encryption key (key itself never on-chain)
params.ipfsCID: IPFS CID of the encrypted dataset

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

devdoc.title: AIDataMarketplace

deactivateDataset(uint256).notice: Deactivate a dataset (by owner or contract owner)

purchaseDataset(uint256).notice: Purchase access to a dataset (pay in MON)

recordTrainingSession(uint256,uint256,by.notice: Record a training session with proof of training

registerDataset(string,string,uint256,st.notice: Register a new encrypted AI dataset on Monad

withdrawEarnings().notice: Provider withdraws accumulated earnings from RoyaltyManager
